Ntc Of Motion To Disqualify Legal Counsel And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SVETLANA SHIRINOVA, TEL. NO. 947-070 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RAGUNATH K. DINDIAL, TEL. NO. 826-9300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ANTON KALAFATI, ALEX KUZNETSOV AND B SIDE, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Disqualify Legal Counsel And FOR CCP SECTION 128.7 Sanctions IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT THE CURRENT REPRESENTATION OF PLAINTIFF IS SUBSTANTIALLY RELATED TO ANY PRIOR REPRESENTATION THAT MAY HAVE EXISTED BETWEEN PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY AND DEFENDANT SUCH THAT THE COURT SHOULD ASSUME THAT THE ATTORNEY ACQUIRED RELEVANT CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. MS. SHIRINOVA TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Kent S. Gubbine, CSR # 5797 =301/PJB
